summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ideas mode refactor - Graph-first UI with horizontal selector strip, full-width chart, and 6-section bottom panel working successfully

integration_issues.issue: ETH idea chip not consistently clickable during automated testing
integration_issues.note: BTC and SOL chips work fine, may be UI state or filtering related

passed_tests: Ideas tab accessible via Tech Analysis navigation
Horizontal Idea Selector Strip displays 3 ideas (BTC, ETH, SOL)
Filter buttons work (All, Active, Win, Loss) - all clickable
Full-width graph displays with dark theme (#0B0F14)
BTC and SOL idea chips update graph and details instantly
IDEA MODE badge visible on chart (top left)
Version badge (V2 - Triangle 78%) visible on chart (top right)
Bottom Insight Panel has all 6 sections working
Evolution block shows pattern → pattern (Rectangle → Triangle)
Probability block shows AI Breakout 78% and Breakdown 18%
Key Levels block shows Breakout $73,500 and Invalidation $68,200
Replay button works and shows replay indicator
Version buttons (V1/V2) work and update chart badge
What Next section shows actionable guidance
Result section shows correct score (+1) and accuracy impact
